description: Apply a reviewed HealProposal atomically (rigid mode = no-op). Pass a proposal `propose_heal` returned — every operation is checked against what HEAL proposes for the graph as it stands now, and anything else is refused before a single write, so hand-editing the proposal or reusing a stale one fails rather than merging the wrong nodes. Merging deletes a node and cannot be undone. Read `discarded` in the result: it lists what the merge could not carry onto the survivor.
name: apply_heal
